Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT A.* FROM product_CAT A WHERE A.pc_ID = @pc_ID

Set.Name: OnNew SQL
OnModify SQL
Set.Sql: UPDATE product_CAT SET pc_NAME = @pc_NAME, pc_NAME_EN = @pc_NAME_EN, pc_MEMO = @pc_MEMO, pc_MEMO_EN = @pc_MEMO_EN, pc_PID = @pc_PID, pc_LVL = @pc_LVL, pc_ORD = @pc_ORD, pc_MDATE = @SYS_DATE, pc_SER_ID = @pc_SER_ID, pc_SER_TAG_ID = @pc_SER_TAG_ID WHERE pc_ID = @pc_ID

Set.Name: SAct0 SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT SER_TAG_ID, SER_TAG_NAME, SER_TAG_NAME_EN FROM ser_tag WHERE SER_ID = @pc_ser_id AND ser_tag = 'NAME' AND SER_TAG_STATUS = 'USED'

Set.Name: SAct1 SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT a.SER_TAG_ID, a.SER_TAG_NAME, a.SER_TAG_NAME_EN FROM ser_tag a inner join ser_tag b on a.ser_tag = b.SER_TAG_FOR_TAG and b.SER_TAG_ID = @pc_ser_tag_id WHERE a.SER_ID = @pc_ser_id AND a.SER_TAG_STATUS = 'USED'

Set.Name: CheckError SQL
Set.Sql: -- select 不能执行 as EWA_ERR_OUT FROM xxx where 1=2

Set.SearchSql: SELECT SER_ID, SER_NAME, SER_NAME_EN FROM SER_MAIN WHERE SER_OB3='USED' ORDER BY SER_NAME

Set.Sql: SELECT SER_ID, SER_NAME, SER_NAME_EN FROM SER_MAIN WHERE SER_OB3 = 'USED' ORDER BY SER_ORD

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT * FROM product_CAT WHERE pc_status = 'USED' ORDER BY pc_LVL, pc_ORD
